# Generated by tools/generate_plane_role_licensing.py.
# Called from recipient scope with ROOT as provider. One type-only chassis license
# supports independently generated recipient-local role designs.

DAI_ensure_basic_small_airframe_chassis_license_from_root = {
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_frame_license_from_@ROOT } }
		DAI_set_license_relation_recipient_to_provider = yes
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_CHASSIS_LICENSE_ATTEMPT | provider=[ROOT.GetName] recipient=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small equipment=small_plane_airframe_1 license_scope=chassis_only recipient_design_mode=local_copy provider_design_gate=passed"
		ROOT = {
			create_production_license = {
				target = PREV
				cost_factor = 0
				new_prioritised = no
				equipment = { type = small_plane_airframe_1 }
			}
		}
		set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_frame_license_from_@ROOT
	}
}

DAI_receive_basic_small_airframe_fighter_c_design_from_root = {
	DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_design_c
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_profile_c_licensed
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_profile_c_licensed_from_@ROOT
	log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[ROOT.GetName] tier=basic_small role=fighter profile=C variant=Fighter 1936 C source=licensed_delivery ownership=recipient_local diplomatic_license=chassis_only"
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_licensed } }
		set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_licensed
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_FRAME_ACCESS | recipient=[THIS.GetName] provider=[ROOT.GetName] tier=basic_small role=fighter profile=C"
	}
}

DAI_receive_basic_small_airframe_fighter_b_design_from_root = {
	DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_design_b
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_profile_b_licensed
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_profile_b_licensed_from_@ROOT
	log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[ROOT.GetName] tier=basic_small role=fighter profile=B variant=Fighter 1936 B source=licensed_delivery ownership=recipient_local diplomatic_license=chassis_only"
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_licensed } }
		set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_licensed
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_FRAME_ACCESS | recipient=[THIS.GetName] provider=[ROOT.GetName] tier=basic_small role=fighter profile=B"
	}
}

DAI_receive_basic_small_airframe_fighter_a_design_from_root = {
	DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_fighter_a_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_design_a
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_profile_a_licensed
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_profile_a_licensed_from_@ROOT
	log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[ROOT.GetName] tier=basic_small role=fighter profile=A variant=Fighter 1936 A source=licensed_delivery ownership=recipient_local diplomatic_license=chassis_only"
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_licensed } }
		set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_licensed
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_FRAME_ACCESS | recipient=[THIS.GetName] provider=[ROOT.GetName] tier=basic_small role=fighter profile=A"
	}
}

DAI_receive_basic_small_airframe_cas_c_design_from_root = {
	DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_cas_c_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_design_c
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_profile_c_licensed
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_profile_c_licensed_from_@ROOT
	log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[ROOT.GetName] tier=basic_small role=cas profile=C variant=CAS 1936 C source=licensed_delivery ownership=recipient_local diplomatic_license=chassis_only"
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_licensed } }
		set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_licensed
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_FRAME_ACCESS | recipient=[THIS.GetName] provider=[ROOT.GetName] tier=basic_small role=cas profile=C"
	}
}

	DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_cas_b_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_design_b
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_profile_b_licensed
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_profile_b_licensed_from_@ROOT

	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_b
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_profile_b_licensed

DAI_receive_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design_from_root = {
	DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_c
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_profile_c_licensed
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_profile_c_licensed_from_@ROOT
	log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[ROOT.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter profile=C variant=Carrier Fighter 1936 C source=licensed_delivery ownership=recipient_local diplomatic_license=chassis_only"
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_licensed } }
		set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_licensed
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_FRAME_ACCESS | recipient=[THIS.GetName] provider=[ROOT.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter profile=C"
	}

DAI_receive_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_design_from_root = {
	DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_b
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_profile_b_licensed

DAI_receive_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_design_from_root = {
	DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_a
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_profile_a_licensed
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_profile_a_licensed_from_@ROOT

		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_FRAME_ACCESS | recipient=[THIS.GetName] provider=[ROOT.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter profile=A"
	}

DAI_receive_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design_from_root = {
	DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_c
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_profile_c_licensed
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_profile_c_licensed_from_@ROOT
	log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[ROOT.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber profile=C variant=Carrier Naval Bomber 1936 C source=licensed_delivery ownership=recipient_local diplomatic_license=chassis_only"
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_licensed } }
		set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_licensed
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_FRAME_ACCESS | recipient=[THIS.GetName] provider=[ROOT.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber profile=C"
	}
}

DAI_receive_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_design_from_root = {
	DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_b
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_profile_b_licensed
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_profile_b_licensed_from_@ROOT
	log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[ROOT.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber profile=B variant=Carrier Naval Bomber 1936 B source=licensed_delivery ownership=recipient_local diplomatic_license=chassis_only"
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_licensed } }
		set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_licensed
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_FRAME_ACCESS | recipient=[THIS.GetName] provider=[ROOT.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber profile=B"
	}
}

DAI_receive_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_design_from_root = {
	DAI_build_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_a
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_profile_a_licensed
	set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_profile_a_licensed_from_@ROOT
	log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[ROOT.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber profile=A variant=Carrier Naval Bomber 1936 A source=licensed_delivery ownership=recipient_local diplomatic_license=chassis_only"
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_licensed } }
		set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_licensed
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_FRAME_ACCESS | recipient=[THIS.GetName] provider=[ROOT.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber profile=A"
	}
}

DAI_deliver_basic_small_airframe_licenses_from_root = {
	if = {
		limit = { DAI_has_deliverable_basic_small_airframe_role_design_from_root = yes }
		DAI_ensure_basic_small_airframe_chassis_license_from_root = yes
		if = {
			limit = { DAI_needs_basic_small_airframe_fighter_design_from_root = yes }
			if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_design_c
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_basic_small_airframe_fighter_c_design_from_root = yes
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_design_b
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_basic_small_airframe_fighter_b_design_from_root = yes
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_fighter_a_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_design_a
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_basic_small_airframe_fighter_a_design_from_root = yes
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { DAI_needs_basic_small_airframe_cas_design_from_root = yes }
			if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_cas_c_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_design_c
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_basic_small_airframe_cas_c_design_from_root = yes
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_cas_b_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_design_b
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_basic_small_airframe_cas_b_design_from_root = yes
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_cas_a_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_design_a
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_basic_small_airframe_cas_a_design_from_root = yes
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { DAI_needs_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_from_root = yes }
			if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_c
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_design_from_root = yes
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_b
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_design_from_root = yes
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_a_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_a
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_a_design_from_root = yes
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { DAI_needs_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_from_root = yes }
			if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_c
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design_from_root = yes
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_b
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_design_from_root = yes
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_a
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_design_from_root = yes
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { DAI_needs_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_from_root = yes }
			if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_c
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design_from_root = yes
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_b
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_design_from_root = yes
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_a
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_design_from_root = yes
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_ensure_improved_small_airframe_chassis_license_from_root = {
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_frame_license_from_@ROOT } }
		DAI_set_license_relation_recipient_to_provider = yes
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_CHASSIS_LICENSE_ATTEMPT | provider=[ROOT.GetName] recipient=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small equipment=small_plane_airframe_2 license_scope=chassis_only recipient_design_mode=local_copy provider_design_gate=passed"
		ROOT = {
			create_production_license = {
				target = PREV
				cost_factor = 0
				new_prioritised = no
				equipment = { type = small_plane_airframe_2 }
			}
		}
		set_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_frame_license_from_@ROOT
	}
}

DAI_receive_improved_small_airframe_fighter_c_design_from_root = {
	DAI_build_improved_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_design_c
	set_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_profile_c_licensed
	set_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_profile_c_licensed_from_@ROOT
	log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[ROOT.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter profile=C variant=Fighter 1940 C source=licensed_delivery ownership=recipient_local diplomatic_license=chassis_only"
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_licensed } }
		set_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_licensed
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_FRAME_ACCESS | recipient=[THIS.GetName] provider=[ROOT.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter profile=C"
	}
}

DAI_receive_improved_small_airframe_fighter_b_design_from_root = {
	DAI_build_improved_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_design_b
	set_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_profile_b_licensed
	set_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_profile_b_licensed_from_@ROOT
	log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[ROOT.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter profile=B variant=Fighter 1940 B source=licensed_delivery ownership=recipient_local diplomatic_license=chassis_only"
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_licensed } }
		set_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_licensed
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_FRAME_ACCESS | recipient=[THIS.GetName] provider=[ROOT.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter profile=B"
	}
}

	set_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_b

	DAI_build_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_a
	set_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_profile_a_licensed

	}
}

DAI_deliver_improved_small_airframe_licenses_from_root = {
	if = {
		limit = { DAI_has_deliverable_improved_small_airframe_role_design_from_root = yes }
		DAI_ensure_improved_small_airframe_chassis_license_from_root = yes
		if = {
			limit = { DAI_needs_improved_small_airframe_fighter_design_from_root = yes }
			if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_design_c
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_improved_small_airframe_fighter_c_design_from_root = yes
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_design_b
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_improved_small_airframe_fighter_b_design_from_root = yes
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_fighter_a_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_design_a
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_improved_small_airframe_fighter_a_design_from_root = yes
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { DAI_needs_improved_small_airframe_cas_design_from_root = yes }
			if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_cas_c_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_cas_design_c
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_improved_small_airframe_cas_c_design_from_root = yes
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_cas_b_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_cas_design_b
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_improved_small_airframe_cas_b_design_from_root = yes
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_cas_a_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_cas_design_a
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_improved_small_airframe_cas_a_design_from_root = yes
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { DAI_needs_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_from_root = yes }
			if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_c
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_design_from_root = yes
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_b
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_design_from_root = yes
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_a_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_a
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_a_design_from_root = yes
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { DAI_needs_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_from_root = yes }
			if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_c
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design_from_root = yes
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_b
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_design_from_root = yes
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_a
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_design_from_root = yes
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { DAI_needs_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_from_root = yes }
			if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_c
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design_from_root = yes
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_b
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_design_from_root = yes
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_a
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_design_from_root = yes
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_ensure_advanced_small_airframe_chassis_license_from_root = {
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_frame_license_from_@ROOT } }
		DAI_set_license_relation_recipient_to_provider = yes
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_CHASSIS_LICENSE_ATTEMPT | provider=[ROOT.GetName] recipient=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small equipment=small_plane_airframe_3 license_scope=chassis_only recipient_design_mode=local_copy provider_design_gate=passed"
		ROOT = {
			create_production_license = {
				target = PREV
				cost_factor = 0
				new_prioritised = no
				equipment = { type = small_plane_airframe_3 }
			}
		}
		set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_frame_license_from_@ROOT
	}
}

DAI_receive_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_c_design_from_root = {
	DAI_build_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_design_c
	set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_profile_c_licensed
	set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_profile_c_licensed_from_@ROOT
	log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[ROOT.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=fighter profile=C variant=Fighter 1944 C source=licensed_delivery ownership=recipient_local diplomatic_license=chassis_only"
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_licensed } }
		set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_licensed
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_FRAME_ACCESS | recipient=[THIS.GetName] provider=[ROOT.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=fighter profile=C"
	}
}

DAI_receive_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_b_design_from_root = {
	DAI_build_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_design_b
	set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_profile_b_licensed
	set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_profile_b_licensed_from_@ROOT
	log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[ROOT.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=fighter profile=B variant=Fighter 1944 B source=licensed_delivery ownership=recipient_local diplomatic_license=chassis_only"
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_licensed } }
		set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_licensed
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_FRAME_ACCESS | recipient=[THIS.GetName] provider=[ROOT.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=fighter profile=B"
	}
}

DAI_receive_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_a_design_from_root = {
	DAI_build_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_a_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_design_a
	set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_profile_a_licensed
	set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_profile_a_licensed_from_@ROOT
	log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[ROOT.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=fighter profile=A variant=Fighter 1944 A source=licensed_delivery ownership=recipient_local diplomatic_license=chassis_only"
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_licensed } }
		set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_licensed
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_FRAME_ACCESS | recipient=[THIS.GetName] provider=[ROOT.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=fighter profile=A"
	}
}

	DAI_build_advanced_small_airframe_cas_c_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_design_c
	set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_profile_c_licensed
	set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_profile_c_licensed_from_@ROOT

		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_FRAME_ACCESS | recipient=[THIS.GetName] provider=[ROOT.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas profile=C"

	set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_c
	set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_profile_c_licensed

		set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_licensed
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_FRAME_ACCESS | recipient=[THIS.GetName] provider=[ROOT.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber profile=C"
	}
}

DAI_receive_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_design_from_root = {
	DAI_build_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_b
	set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_profile_b_licensed
	set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_profile_b_licensed_from_@ROOT
	log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[ROOT.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber profile=B variant=Carrier Naval Bomber 1944 B source=licensed_delivery ownership=recipient_local diplomatic_license=chassis_only"

		set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_licensed
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_FRAME_ACCESS | recipient=[THIS.GetName] provider=[ROOT.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber profile=B"
	}
}

DAI_receive_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_design_from_root = {
	DAI_build_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_design = yes
	set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_a
	set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_profile_a_licensed
	set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_profile_a_licensed_from_@ROOT
	log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_DESIGN_CREATE | owner=[THIS.GetName] source_provider=[ROOT.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber profile=A variant=Carrier Naval Bomber 1944 A source=licensed_delivery ownership=recipient_local diplomatic_license=chassis_only"
	if = {
		limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_licensed } }
		set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_licensed
		log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_FRAME_ACCESS | recipient=[THIS.GetName] provider=[ROOT.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber profile=A"
	}
}

DAI_deliver_advanced_small_airframe_licenses_from_root = {
	if = {
		limit = { DAI_has_deliverable_advanced_small_airframe_role_design_from_root = yes }
		DAI_ensure_advanced_small_airframe_chassis_license_from_root = yes
		if = {
			limit = { DAI_needs_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_design_from_root = yes }
			if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_design_c
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_c_design_from_root = yes
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_b_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_design_b
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_b_design_from_root = yes
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_a_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_design_a
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_a_design_from_root = yes
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { DAI_needs_advanced_small_airframe_cas_design_from_root = yes }
			if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_cas_c_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_design_c
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_advanced_small_airframe_cas_c_design_from_root = yes
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_cas_b_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_design_b
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_advanced_small_airframe_cas_b_design_from_root = yes
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_cas_a_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_design_a
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_advanced_small_airframe_cas_a_design_from_root = yes
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { DAI_needs_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_from_root = yes }
			if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_c
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_design_from_root = yes
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_b
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_b_design_from_root = yes
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_a_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_a
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_a_design_from_root = yes
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { DAI_needs_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_from_root = yes }
			if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_c
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design_from_root = yes
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_b
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_b_design_from_root = yes
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_a
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_a_design_from_root = yes
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { DAI_needs_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_from_root = yes }
			if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_c
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design_from_root = yes
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_b
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_b_design_from_root = yes
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					ROOT = {
						DAI_best_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_design = yes
						has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_a
					}
				}
				DAI_receive_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_a_design_from_root = yes
			}
		}
	}
}
